payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Dark brown stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular center panel, glossy varnished finish and visible wood grain; no handle visible and the crop is slightly edge‑cropped at the sides — appears within about 0.8 m of the camera.
